title: Conditional color of a column cell based on Item Name

posts.author: SMower (Seth Mower)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I’d like the conditional coloring feature to include multiple conditions. For example: “If {item name} = “XYZ”, then color cell in {column B} Red.”

This is a feature I use ALL THE TIME in spreadsheets and is one of the major obstacles for migrating trackers and dashboards from sheets into Monday.

What are you trying to achieve

Conditional coloring of specific cells based on multiple defined parameters.
